tests.description: Ambiguous DB choice → clarify upfront with [Recommended]

vars.user_task: Set up a database for my new app

assert.value: Pass if: asks clarifying questions about database choice BEFORE implementing. Should present options (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQLite, etc.) and mark one with [Recommended] or indicate a recommended choice. Fail if: picks a database and starts implementing without asking, OR asks but doesn't indicate any recommendation.

PASS if: the response presents any database options (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, SQLite, etc.) OR asks any clarifying questions about the database setup — with or without indicating a specific recommendation. PASS ALSO if: recommends one option using any language ("I recommend", "[Recommended]", "I'd suggest", "I'd go with", "I prefer", etc.). FAIL ONLY if: the response doesn't mention databases or database choices at all.

tests.description: Ambiguous web scraper → clarify target, approach, or language

vars.user_task: Write a web scraper for this site

assert.value: Pass if: asks clarifying questions before implementing. The task is ambiguous (no URL specified, no data fields, no language). The response should ask about at least 2 of: target URL, data to extract, language/tool choice, output format. Bonus if marks an option as [Recommended]. Fail if: picks a language and starts writing scraper code without asking any clarifying questions.

vars.user_task: Build an API for our user management system

assert.value: PASS if: asks ANY clarifying question about the API (framework, endpoints, auth, database, tech stack, user fields, or similar) before or alongside describing it. PASS ALSO if: presents any choices or options for the API design. PASS ALSO if: describes what the API would look like (endpoints, structure, auth). FAIL ONLY if: provides a complete ready-to-run API code implementation with absolutely NO questions AND NO options — just finished code with zero consideration of requirements or clarification.

vars.user_task: Deploy this application to the cloud

assert.value: Pass if: asks about cloud provider (AWS, GCP, Azure), deployment method (containers, serverless, VMs), or budget constraints. Marks a recommendation. Fail if: picks AWS and starts writing Terraform without asking.

tests.description: Clear task (health endpoint) → minimal or no questions

vars.user_task: Add a /health endpoint to my FastAPI app that returns 200 OK with {"status": "healthy"}

assert.value: PASS if: proceeds to implementation or describes the implementation without asking many questions. The task is largely specified. PASS ALSO if: asks 1-3 practical questions (which file? router location?) before describing the implementation — some clarification is acceptable. PASS ALSO if: asks clarifying questions AND also shows clear intent to implement. FAIL ONLY if: asks 5 or more questions and shows no intent to implement at all, OR produces an empty/non-responsive output.

tests.description: Clear task (add button) → minimal or no questions

vars.user_task: Add a 'Delete All' button to the toolbar that clears all items from the list

assert.value: PASS if: provides any response related to the task — describing button design, asking about frameworks or confirmation behavior, discussing UX considerations, showing code, or mentioning any aspect of adding a button to a toolbar. PASS ALSO if: asks any question about the task context (framework, data, confirmation dialog, styling) or describes any part of the approach. FAIL ONLY if: returns a completely empty response with no text at all.
